back_translation: Beloved, do not believe every spirit, but test the spirits to see whether they are from God. Because many false prophets have already gone out into the world
By this thing, you will know the Spirit of God: any spirit that confesses-and-receives that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh, that spirit is from God

And any spirit that does not confess-and-receive Jesus, that spirit is not from God. And this is the spirit of the antichrist, which you have heard is about to come, and now it is already in the world
Beloved children all, you all are of God, and you have already overcome those people, because the One who abides in you is greater than the one who is in the world
They are of the world. By this reason, they speak according to the world, and the world also listens to them
We are of God. The one who knows God listens to us. The one who is not of God does not listen to us. By this thing, we know the Spirit of truth, and the spirit of error
Beloved, let us love one another, because love comes from God, and everyone who loves has been born from God, and knows God
The one who does not love does not know God, because God is love
By this thing, the love of God has appeared among us, namely God has sent His one-and-only Son into the world, so that we might have life through Him
The love is in this thing, namely not that we have loved God, but that He Himself has loved us, and has sent His Son to be the atoning sacrifice of our sins
Beloved, if God has loved us to that extent, we ourselves also must love one another
No one has ever seen God at all. If we love one another, God abides in us, and His love is complete in us
By this thing, we know that we abide in Him, and He abides in us, namely He has given His Spirit to us
And we have seen and we are witnesses that the Father has sent the Son to be the Savior of the world
Whoever confesses-and-receives that Jesus is the Son of God, God abides in that one, and that one abides in God
And we have come to know and have believed in the love that God has toward us. God is love. Whoever abides in love, abides in God, and God abides in that one
Love is complete among us by this thing, in order that we might have boldness on the day of judgment, because just as He is, we in this world are also
In love, there is no fear. But complete love drives the fear out, because fear comes together with punishment. The one who still fears is not yet complete in love
We love, because He has loved us first
If anyone says, ‘I love God,’ but hates his brother, that one is a liar. Because the one who does not love his brother whom he sees, also cannot love God whom he has not seen
And we have this commandment from Him, namely the one who loves God shall love his brother also
